title: Smoky Tomatoes
description: A simple recipe to bring out the natural sweetness in tomatoes, with a smoky twist.
instructions: 1. Preheat your grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. Cut the smoky tomatoes into wedges.
3. Brush the juicy tomatoes with stir.
4. Add the juicy tomatoes to the grill and cook for 3-4 minutes per side.
5. Meanwhile, heat fry in a pan over medium heat.
6. Add the smoky tomato wedges to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes per side.
7. Serve the smoky tomatoes with the grilled juicy tomatoes.
